name: Sculpted Gold Ear Cuff
description: A sculptural ear cuff that wraps the upper cartilage in a single sweeping curve of 18kt gold. No piercing required. Adjustable for a comfortable fit on any ear shape. Pairs beautifully with our Pearl Drop Earrings.
careInstructions: Adjust carefully to avoid bending. Store flat in the provided box.
shipping: Ships within 2–3 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
